prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年天津市综合类最低录取位次分别为约9985名、9949名、12429名、13205名、12510名。2021–2022年稳定在1万名以内，2023年起明显后移至1.2万–1.3 万名区间；2025年较2024年回升约695名，但整体仍处于近年高位区间，2025年基准位次约12510名；该校在天津市综合类招生计划2021–2022年均为87人，2023 年88人，2024–2025年增至91人；2026年计划进一步扩至98人，较2025年增加7人（+7.7%），连续三年扩招，竞争压力有所缓解。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 华中农业大学为211 工程、国家双一流建设高校；软科中国大学主榜排名近年稳定在42–47名（2026年45名），在农林类高校中位居前列，综合实力认可度高；该校近年声誉平稳， 未出现明显负面或正面舆情事件；抖音综合热度排名第54位（较热），短视频平台有一定关注度，但未出现爆款级传播，报考热度整体温和；第五轮学科评估中 ，兽医学、畜牧学获评A+，作物学、水产、食品科学与工程获评A，共5个A类学科，农林特色鲜明，对相关专业考生有较强吸引力。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 2026年天津市高考报 名总人数约8.2万人，较2025年7.19万人增加约1万人（+14%），考生规模持续扩大，整体竞争加剧；华中农业大学位于湖 北武汉，非天津本地高校，在津招生占比约2%–3%，无显著地域偏好影响。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2025年基准位次12510名、2026年扩招7人（+7.7%）的竞争缓解效应、以及天津市 考生总数大幅增长约14%带来的竞争加剧压力，扩招与考生增长方向相反但后者力度更大，预计2026年最低录取位次较2025年小幅后移。预测最低位次约13137名，区间12637–1363 7名。

major_tier_recommendation.tier_3:

major_tier_recommendation.overall_advice: 预测位次约13137名，区间12637–13637名。位次在区间下限12637名以内可重点冲刺一档王牌专业（动物医学、生物科学类、计算机类等）；位次在13137名附近建议以二档专业 为主，兼顾优势学科（园艺、植物生产类、水产类等A类学科相关专业）；位次在13637名附近建议以三档专业保底，确保录取。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum admission rankings for Tianjin Comprehensive category were approximately 9985, 9949, 12429, 13205, and 12510 respectively. It stabilized within 10,000 in 2021–2022, then significantly shifted to the 12,000–13,000 range from 2023 onward; in 2025, it rebounded by about 695 places compared to 2024, but overall remains at a high level in recent years, with a baseline ranking of approximately 12510 in 2025. The university's enrollment plan for Tianjin Comprehensive category was 87 students in 2021–2022, 88 in 2023, and increased to 91 in 2024–2025; the 2026 plan further expands to 98 students, an increase of 7 (+7.7%) compared to 2025, marking three consecutive years of expansion, easing competitive pressure.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Huazhong Agricultural University is a 211 Project and national Double First-Class university; its main ranking in the Soft Science China University Rankings has been stable at 42–47 in recent years (45th in 2026), ranking among the top in agricultural and forestry universities, with high comprehensive strength recognition. The university's reputation has been stable in recent years, with no significant negative or positive public opinion incidents; its comprehensive Douyin popularity ranking is 54th (relatively hot), with some attention on short video platforms but no viral-level dissemination, resulting in a generally moderate application heat. In the fifth round of discipline evaluation, Veterinary Medicine and Animal Science received A+, Crop Science, Fisheries, and Food Science and Engineering received A, totaling 5 A-level disciplines, highlighting distinctive agricultural and forestry characteristics, which strongly attract related major applicants.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: In 2026, the total number of Tianjin college entrance examination registrants is approximately 82,000, an increase of about 10,000 (+14%) compared to 71,900 in 2025, with the candidate pool continuing to expand, intensifying overall competition. Huazhong Agricultural University is located in Wuhan, Hubei, not a local Tianjin university, with an enrollment share of about 2%–3% in Tianjin, with no significant regional preference impact.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the baseline ranking of 12510 in 2025, the competitive relief effect of expanding enrollment by 7 students (+7.7%) in 2026, and the intensified competition pressure from a significant 14% increase in Tianjin candidate numbers, the expansion and candidate growth have opposite directions but the latter has greater force. It is expected that the minimum admission ranking in 2026 will slightly shift backward compared to 2025. The predicted minimum ranking is approximately 13137, with a range of 12637–13637.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: Predicted ranking approximately 13137, range 12637–13637. Candidates with rankings within the lower limit of 12637 can focus on sprinting for Tier 1 flagship majors (Animal Medicine, Biological Sciences, Computer Class, etc.); those around 13137 are advised to primarily target Tier 2 majors, while considering advantageous disciplines (Horticulture, Plant Production Class, Aquaculture Class and other A-level discipline-related majors); those around 13637 are advised to use Tier 3 majors as safety options to ensure admission.
